overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning on a covered terrace overlooking a city skyline, descending to waterfront level, and walking along a path lined with distinctive red structural beams toward a futuristic terminal building. The scene features bright midday sunlight, clear skies, and a complete absence of pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront terrace with glass railings overlooking city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered terrace area with glass walls, passing benches and palm trees while overlooking the distant city skyline

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass panels providing view of the waterfront and city
tall palm tree in a planter box on the terrace
distant futuristic high-rise buildings with neon accents visible through the glass
tall red structural support beams visible in the far distance along the waterfront
large square concrete tiles covering the terrace floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered waterfront terrace with floor-to-ceiling glass railings offering views of a distant futuristic city skyline. The camera moves forward past concrete benches and palm trees planted in the tiled floor, with red structural beams visible far in the distance along the waterfront path.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior stairway descending from terrace to waterfront level

events.description: exits the covered glass terrace into an open exterior stairwell
descends concrete stairs toward the waterfront promenade level

agents.ego_description: walking down exterior concrete stairs from the terrace level to the waterfront promenade below

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs leading down to the waterfront level
silver metal handrail along the right side of the stairs
smooth gray exterior wall of the modern building
calm body of water visible beyond the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered terrace and descends an exterior concrete stairway with metal handrails. The building wall runs along the right side while the ocean becomes visible in the distance. The city skyline shifts to the left as the descent continues toward the waterfront promenade level.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with red structural beams and advertising billboards

events.description: turns left onto the main waterfront promenade path
passing large vertical advertising billboards mounted on the red structural beams

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing palm trees and large advertising billboards mounted on red structural beams

entered.detail: tall red curved structural beams running parallel to the path, creating a distinctive architectural rhythm
large vertical digital billboards with red and white graphics mounted between the structural beams
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with embedded rail tracks
metal safety railing along the edge of the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a wide open waterfront promenade characterized by distinctive tall red structural beams on the left supporting large advertising billboards. The path runs parallel to the ocean on the right, separated by a metal railing. Palm trees line the walkway at intervals as the camera moves steadily forward toward a distant futuristic building, with the city skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching futuristic terminal building at promenade end

events.description: approaching the curved futuristic terminal building at the end of the promenade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path toward the futuristic terminal building, passing the last of the red structural beams

entered.detail: curved modern building with weathered concrete upper facade and large glass windows at ground level, featuring futuristic design elements

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a distinctive curved futuristic terminal building at the end of the promenade. The red structural beams recede into the distance on the left as the camera moves closer to the building's glass entrance. The waterfront path continues straight toward the structure, with the ocean still visible to the right and the city skyline now shifted to the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered terrace overlooking a futuristic skyline down to an open waterfront promenade leading toward a terminal building. It begins on a covered terrace with glass railings and palm trees, moving forward past concrete benches toward the distant waterfront. As the camera exits the cover, it descends an exterior concrete stairway, shifting the city skyline to the left while the ocean gradually comes into view. The scene then opens onto a wide promenade lined with tall red structural beams and advertising billboards, moving steadily forward between the palm trees and a metal railing bordering the sea. Finally, the camera approaches a curved futuristic terminal building, with the red beams receding as the path leads directly toward the glass entrance under a clear midday sky.
